headline: Government Drops Sweeping AI Chip Export Rules: Can Nvidia Start Growing Again?
summary: Nvidia’s (NASDAQ:NVDA) AI chips remain the hottest commodity in tech, with hyperscalers and enterprises scrambling for every Blackwell and Hopper GPU available. Demand continues to eclipse supply, powering record data-center revenue that has transformed the company into a trillion-dollar powerhouse. Yet Nvidia stock has traded largely sideways for much of the past year amid investor ... Government Drops Sweeping AI Chip Export Rules: Can Nvidia Start Growing Again?

headline: NVIDIA GTC 2026 AI Platforms And Partnerships Reshape Investor Expectations
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) used GTC 2026 to introduce enterprise ready AI platforms and expand its role across cloud, sovereign and open source AI infrastructure. The company previewed NeMo Studio running on NVIDIA Run:ai, targeting scaled, quota controlled, multi tenant GPU clusters for enterprise AI development. NVIDIA announced deeper alliances, including a full stack sovereign AI architecture with Palantir for regulated sectors and a multi billion partnership with Nebius Group focused on...
